_metadata.description: Federal Grants and Contributions Open Data resource inventory
_metadata.source: Government of Canada Open Data Portal (open.canada.ca)
notes: Unlike CRA data which has separate UUIDs per dataset per year, Federal Grants has a single resource containing all fiscal years
The dataset contains ~1.2M+ records across all fiscal years and all departments
Records are identified by _id (internal row ID) and ref_number (department reference)
The dataset also has a 'grants-nil' resource for nothing-to-report quarters

grants.name: Grants and Contributions
grants.description: Federal grants and contributions: recipient, program, financial, and organizational details
